description.setup: camera attached to gripper, ChArUco target fixed on floor/table
description.robot_pose: myCobot get_coords() interpreted as ^bT_g, gripper to base
description.vision_pose: ChArUco solvePnP interpreted as ^cT_t, target to camera
description.validation: ^bT_t_i = ^bT_g_i @ ^gT_c @ ^cT_t_i should be nearly constant because target is fixed
